summary: Iteration 51: Storage stats, storage settings, support tickets, and support widget testing - Backend APIs all pass (9/9 tests). Frontend features verified: Digital Media tab shows storage settings (Max Storage, Max Duration, Auto-Delete) and Storage Usage dashboard (4 boxes). Support Tickets tab working with status filters. Support Widget on Guardian Portal working with all form elements. Messaging tab has CSS specificity issue with text contrast.

issues: CSS specificity issue: .sv-dark class in App.css uses !important to override inline styles. Text inputs show cream text on dark background instead of requested dark text on white background. Line 76-120 in AdminMessagingTab.jsx has correct inline styles { color: '#111827', backgroundColor: 'white' } but App.css line has .sv-dark input/textarea/select with !important overrides.
Fix: Either add !important to inline styles, create a .bright-input class that overrides .sv-dark, or remove !important from App.css .sv-dark rules for admin forms.

action_items: Fix CSS specificity for AdminMessagingTab inputs - create .bright-input class or add !important to inline styles to override .sv-dark rules
critical_code_review_comments: Backend storage-stats endpoint working correctly - returns total_storage_mb, recordings_storage_mb, media_storage_mb, support_storage_mb, recordings_count, media_count
Media settings now support max_storage_per_user_mb, max_recording_duration_sec, auto_delete_recordings_days fields
Digital Media tab Storage Usage dashboard shows 4 boxes with correct labels (Total, Recordings, Media, Support Files)
Support Widget button positioned at bottom-20 right-6 to avoid Emergent badge overlap
All support widget form elements present (type dropdown, subject, message, Screenshot/Audio/File buttons, Send to Admin button)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All features working except messaging input contrast CSS issue

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Iter51_Ticket support ticket for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 tested: 1) Storage stats API - GET /api/admin/storage-stats returns breakdown of total, recordings, media, support storage. 2) Media settings now include max_storage_per_user_mb, max_recording_duration_sec, auto_delete_recordings_days. 3) Digital Media tab has Storage Usage dashboard with 4 boxes. 4) Support Tickets tab has status filter buttons (All, Open, In Progress, Replied, Resolved). 5) Support Widget on Guardian Portal has all form elements. CSS specificity issue in Messaging tab: .sv-dark !important rules override inline styles for input contrast.

storage_stats_api.details: GET /api/admin/storage-stats returns total_storage_mb, recordings_storage_mb, media_storage_mb, support_storage_mb, recordings_count, media_count

digital_media_tab_storage_ui.details: Storage settings fields (Max Storage per User MB, Max Recording Duration sec, Auto-Delete days) and Storage Usage dashboard with 4 boxes (Total, Recordings, Media, Support Files) all visible

admin_support_tickets_tab.details: Tab exists with status filter buttons (All, OPEN, IN PROGRESS, REPLIED, RESOLVED). Shows test tickets with status badges.

support_widget.details: Floating gold button at bottom-20 right-6. Opens panel with type dropdown, subject input, message textarea, Screenshot/Audio/File attachment buttons, Send to Admin button.

messaging_contrast.details: Inline styles for white background/dark text are overridden by .sv-dark !important CSS rules in App.css. Text appears cream (#F8F5EE) on dark background instead of dark on white.
